product_name: Gyeon Q²m Towelwash Mikrofiber Bez Havlu Eldiven Keçe Ped Yıkama Şampuanı - 500 ml

sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M TOWELWASH

## Exterior / Interior / Preparation

### Dedicated microfibre wash detergent.

Q²M TowelWash is a specialised detergent designed to clean and maintain microfibre towels. It removes dirt, polishing residues and product build up while preserving the fibres' softness and absorbency.

![product image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_towel-wash_500_2023-1024x991.png)

## Superb microfiber and wool washing aid.

Q²M TowelWash extends the life and performance of microfibre towels by cleaning them thoroughly without damaging the fibres. Proper washing ensures towels remain safe and effective for detailing tasks.

- HIGHLY CONCENTRATED FORMULA
- HAND AND MACHINE WASH
- FOR ALL FABRICS

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![technical detail image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mtowelwash.webp)

- CAPACITIES: 500 ML
- Consumption: 30ml/wash
- PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL

## HOW TO USE

1. Shake towels to remove loose debris.
2. Add 15/30ml of Q²M TowelWash to the washing machine. Do not overuse it.
3. Wash on a gentle cycle with warm water.
4. Do not use fabric softener or bleach.
5. Air dry.

## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**Can Q²M TowelWash be used for all microfibres?**
Yes. It is suitable for all detailing towels.

**Does it remove polish and coating residue?**
It will break down polish residue, but coating towels should not be reused.

**Can it be used in a washing machine?**
Yes. It is machine safe.

**Should fabric softener be used?**
No. Fabric softener should be avoided.

**Does it help towels last longer?**
Yes. Proper cleaning preserves fibre structure.

## Recommended Pairing

- Q²M SILKDRYER EVO - Sizes: 50x55 cm / 70x90 cm - The total absorbency is up to 50% higher than it was before.
- Q²M POLISHWIPE EVO - Sizes: 40x40 cm - The perfect tool for the polishing process.
- Q²M SOFTWIPE EVO - Sizes: 40x40 cm - Extremely thick, gentle fibres perfect for wiping coatings, quick detailers and spray sealants.
- Q²M WAFFLEDRYER EVO - Sizes: 40x40 cm / 40x60 cm / 60x80 cm - The classic option among all drying towels.
- Q²M BALDWIPE EVO - Sizes: 40x40 cm - Equally effective during cleaning, polishing, or maintaining a vehicle.

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON - Q²M TowelWash

Product Code: Q2MTOWEL

Rating: 4 reviews

GYEON Q²M Towel Wash is a gentle yet effective detergent designed for microfibre towels. Removes polish, coating, and dirt residues while maintaining softness and absorbency wash after wash.

Price: £16.00 (Ex VAT: £13.33)

Brand: GYEON

Availability: 8 In Stock

![product image](image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/towel-wash/gyeon-towel-wash-photo-b-756x698h.webp)

![product image](image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/towel-wash/gyeon-towel-wash-photo-756x698h.webp)

![product image](image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/towel-wash/gyeon-towel-wash-photo-c-756x698h.webp)

![product image](image/cache/wp/gj/product/Gyeon/towel-wash/gyeon-towel-wash-photo-a-756x698h.webp)

## Gyeon Q²M Towel Wash

Gyeon Q2M TowelWash is a liquid detergent specifically designed and formulated for the cleaning of your Microfibre Cloths and Applicators. Unlike conventional laundry detergents, Q2M TowelWash contains no bleach or fabric softeners, both which will actually damage the structure of the microfibre fabrics over time.

Good high quality microfibres don't come cheap, and as much as we all know you can never have too many microfibre cloths, maintenance and after-use care and washing is not something that often spoken about.

Gyeon Q2M Towel Wash will clean your cloths safely, effectively and will help preserve the performance of your Microfibre Cloths and applicators even after many washes. Use Gyeon Q²M Towel Wash to wash your Microfibre Towels, Cloths, Wax & Polish Applicators and even Foam Polishing Pads and Lambswool Wash Mitts.

### Directions for use:

For front loading machines rated up to 8kg, add 30 ml for half loads, 50 ml for full loads to the detergent / soap tray.

Wash at a maximum temperature of 40°C and use a slow spin only. After washing has completed, it is recommended that you should only naturally air dry, or use a dryer on a low/cool setting only.

Use of a hot dryer or heater may permanently damage and shrink their polyamide content, in turn reducing their softness and absorbency.

Size: 500ml Bottle

[NOTE: This URL was indexed under Gyeon TowelWash but the page content returned is for Gyeon Glass -- a different product. Data below reflects the actual page content.]

# Gyeon Glass - 500 ml

Price: $13.99

Quantity Discount: 2+ at $12.99 (7% off)

## Available Sizes

- 500 ml - $13.99 ($0.03/ml)
- 4 L - $59.99 ($0.01/ml)

## Product Information

- Highly effective, streak free glass cleaner
- Encapsulates dirt and grime for safe removal
- Do not apply in direct sunlight or on hot glass, otherwise streaking may occur
- Product Codes: GY-3408, GY-3439

## Product Description

Gyeon Glass will help you clean your glass, leaving a streak free shine! Contamination naturally accumulates on both the interior and exterior glass faster than you may think. Dirt and grime can stick to the micro pores of your glass almost instantaneously and once it bonds to the glass, this contamination can be a pain to remove. It can also cause light to fragment, which can cause dangerous driving conditions. The quality cleaning agents in Gyeon Glass will encapsulate nasty dirt and grime buildups and lubricate the surface, allowing you to safely and easily remove contamination. After use, you will be left with crystal clear glass surfaces, no smudges or streaks! For best results, Gyeon recommends applying nice and thin, out of the sun, and only on glass surfaces that are cool to the touch. Gyeon Glass will not affect previously applied rain repellents, making it a great maintenance cleaner.

Important: This item cannot be shipped, sold, or used in the state of California. CARB in California claims this item breaks their VOC regulations.

## From The Label

Streak and smudge free quality glass cleaner. Crystal clear view.

- Clear view
- Safe on all surfaces
- Leaves no streaks

### Directions

Q2M Glass Cleaner will not affect your hydrophobic rain repellent. Spray onto a Q2M GlassWipe Evo and clean the surface. Give the surface a quick wipe with a dry part of the towel. DO NOT WORK IN DIRECT SUNLIGHT. DO NOT SPRAY ON HOT GLASS. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

## Customer Reviews (91% would buy again, based on 11 ratings)

"Got this refill after using smaller bottles over the years. The only glass cleaner that I have found effective and minimizes streaking." - Donald H., 3/27/2024

"Ive been using this cleaner for about 3 years. Now and then I will try a different brand, but always come back to this." - Benjamin S., 11/10/2023

"Great product, they need to make this item in a larger size." - Robert M., 2/3/2023

sources.cleaned_content:
# GYEON Q²M Towel Wash & Pad Detergent 500ml

Price: $25.00 CAD

Brand: Gyeon

SKU: 1792

Barcode: 8809432672104

![product image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/products/GYEON-Q2M_TowelWash_500ml_2020-3000_be160677-b2a7-4c51-aa4b-51c39a606da1.png?v=1633626327&width=1800)

## Gentle & Effective towel wash

High-quality microfibers are precious accessories for every detailer. That's why taking good care of them is very important. Gyeon TowelWash is a gentle washing solution designed for cleaning microfiber towels without affecting their performance. It may also be used as a gentle wash for natural wool wash mitts during a hand wash. It helps remove dirt and any contamination build-up, thoroughly cleaning the fibers.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Towel_Wash2.webp?v=1703015037&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_towel_wash1.webp?v=1703013395&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Towel_Wash3.webp?v=1703018444&width=2400)

### ECO-FRIENDLY

Since microfibers are often washed in the same washing machine as your clothes, Gyeon made TowelWash totally biodegradable and safe for the environment. Not only does it contain no fragrance or color additives, but it also has no harmful effects on the ecosystem.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_towel_wash4.webp?v=1703024009&width=2400)

### Suitable for pads cleaning

Gyeon TowelWash can be used to clean your polishing pads, even those made of wool. It will help remove polishing paste even during a hand wash.

**TIP**: The amount of product used depends on the hardness of the water supplied in your area. If you have a water purification system, use as little as 10ml per wash! We recommend using 30ml per wash for areas with higher levels of water hardness.

## Superb maintenance products for outstanding detailing performance

Our experience and laboratory tests have shown that the best results in cleaning and maintaining microfibers are achieved when a 'pure' cleanser is used. No fabric softeners, no fragrance, no color additives – that is why Q²M Towel Wash remains pure.

- PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
- CONSUMPTION: 30ml/wash

### ECO-FRIENDLY

We care about our planet and its future. As microfibers are often washed in the same washing machine as your clothes, we made Q²M TowelWash totally bio-degradable and safe for the environment. Not only are there no fragrance or color additives inside, there are no bad effects on the ecosystem.

### GENTLE & EFFECTIVE

High quality microfibers are precious accessories for every detailer. That's why taking good care of them is very important. Q²M Towel Wash is a gentle washing liquid for cleaning microfiber towels without affecting their performance. Q²M TowelWash may also be used as a gentle wash for natural wool wash mitts during a hand wash. It helps remove dirt and any contamination build up, thoroughly cleaning the fibres.

### ADVICE ON APPLICATION AND PRECAUTIONS

Use 50ml for a regular washing machine cycle. Use approx. 30ml for 5 liters of hot water during hand washing of wool wash mitts. Skin protection recommended. Work in a well-ventilated area. Store in a dark, dry and cool place. Keep out of reach of children. Rinse all treated fabrics well.

## FAQ

**Can it be used for cleaning polishing pads?**
Yes, it can act as a pad-cleaning agent.

**Do/Can I need to mix the solution with normal fabric agent?**
No, we do not recommend adding any additional cleaning agents with Gyeon Towel Wash. Keeping it 'pure' will give you the best result!

**How to store the product after use? What is the shelf life once opened?**
Secure the pump's top opening in the closed position and store it in a dark, dry area with a temperature between 15 - 30 degrees Celsius.

**Is it safe to use with a washing machine?**
Yes, it's biodegradable and safe. It contains no fragrance or color additives.

# Gyeon Q2M Towel Wash - 500 ml

Brand: Gyeon

![product image](//www.in2detailing.co.uk/cdn/shop/files/IMG-2110_2048x2048.jpg?v=1735224960)

## GYEON Q2M TowelWash Microfiber Towel Liquid Detergent 500ml

### PURE PERFORMANCE

Our experience and laboratory tests have shown that the best results in cleaning and maintaining microfibers are achieved when a 'pure' cleanser is used. No fabric softeners, no fragrance, no colour additives – that is why Q2M TowelWash remains pure.

### ECO-FRIENDLY, DOES NOT POLLUTE THE ENVIRONMENT

We care about our planet and its future. As microfibers are often washed in the same washing machine as your clothes, we made Q2M TowelWash totally bio-degradable and safe for the environment. Not only are there no fragrance or colour additives inside, there are no bad effects on the ecosystem.

### GENTLE

High quality microfibers are precious accessories for every detailer, whether pro or enthusiast. They can speed up work without spoiling the overall effect, by leaving blemishes or light scratches. That's why taking good care of them is very important. Q2M TowelWash is a gentle washing liquid for cleaning microfiber towels without affecting their performance.

### EFFECTIVE

Only a small amount of Q2M TowelWash is sufficient for a major wash in your washing machine. It deeply cleans the fabric, removing polishing pastes, debris or quartz coating staining.

### SUITABLE FOR WOOL

Q2M TowelWash may also be used as a gentle wash for natural wool wash mitts during a hand wash. It helps remove dirt and any contamination build up, thoroughly cleaning the fibres. Always ensure you rinse the mitt after and allow to dry completely.

### ADVICE ON APPLICATION:

- Use 50ml for a regular washing machine cycle.
- Use approx. 30ml for 5 litres of hot water during hand washing of wool wash mitts.

### PRECAUTIONS

- Skin protection recommended.
- Work in a well-ventilated area.
- Store in a dark, dry and cool place.
- Keep out of reach of children.
- Rinse all treated fabrics well.

## Customer Reviews (3 reviews, 100% 5-star)

**Colin Goodwin** - "Why didn't I purchase sooner." Always believed that a dedicated cleaning detergent was a load of fuss and nonsense. Stumbled on the Esoteric detailing company website in USA, and they recommended this product. Worth checking out their site and excellent YouTube videos. Used it for first time today and is very good.

**Paul Harrison** - "Gyeon Towel Wash" I have tried other towel washing products but this one is the best so-far.

**Guv Matharu** - Gyeon Q2M Towel Wash - 500 ml
